en.title: Cape Horn, the most dangerous sea passage on Earth
en.description:
Cape Horn is in the extreme south of America. It is estimated that there were about 800 shipwrecks there and that 10,000 people lost their lives while trying to unite the Pacific and Atlantic oceans.

In this video we propose to discover why it is a unique place. We will also know some surprising peculiarities of the indigenous people who inhabited the area.

Thanks @Sir Chandler for participating! We invite you to know his channel.

snippet.title: Justin Bieber - Live from Paris (Livestream)
snippet.description:
Against the breathtaking backdrop of the City Of Lights, and from the lush ruins of a vacant but majestic Parisian hotel, Justin Bieber brings his new album Justice to life with five stunning performances, four of them live debuts. This fifteen minute special brings fans directly into Justinâs world and opens the doors to his powerful new album.

snippet.title: Chonkers Off-Road Tires Arrive To The Fortnite Island
snippet.description:
Built for handling the toughest driving conditions, Chonkers Off-Road Tires make getting around off road easier in any vehicle.

The Chonkers Off-Road Tires are the first Mod to arrive to the Fortnite Island. These tires are perfect for when you want to take the scenic route but don't want to sacrifice the smooth ride of your current vehicle. Find these tires on the ground or even in some tire piles around the Island.

Hop in, grab a pair of Chonkers Off-Road Tires and take it off road!

#FortniteChonkers #ChonkersOffRoadTires #Fortnite

snippet.description:
Dios AsÃ­ Lo Quiso ððŦ
Ricardo Montaner y Juan Luis Guerra (Video Oficial)
--
Dios asÃ­ lo quiso la hicimos en el estudio, estÃĄbamos reunidos los hermanos David y Jonathan Julca, Camilo Echeverri, Yasmil Marrufo y yo, y empezÃģ a surgir algo que no tenia ni un porquÃĐ, ni la tenÃ­amos muy clara de lo que estÃĄbamos buscando. SabÃ­amos que lo que yo querÃ­a era una canciÃģn de amor de pareja siguiendo los fundamentos de este ÃĄlbum dedicado al amor, del sentimiento profundo que una persona puede tener por su pareja. âDios asÃ­ lo quisoâ es una canciÃģn de amor, que con el correr del tiempo fue tomando esta cadencia como de cumbia que me llevaba si o si al Caribe. Una vez que le montÃĐ la voz todos me decÃ­an: esta canciÃģn a dÃšo  con Juan Luis serÃ­a espectacular.

ÂŋPorquÃĐ Juan Luis? 
Primero porque soy un fan de toda la mÃšsica de Juan Luis. Lo conozco de hace mucho y es un hermano que mi familia y yo queremos mucho. Por otro lado, ÃĐl ha hecho una espectacular carrera y su legado musical va a ser eterno. Siempre, siempre, la gente me ha comentado: Âŋpara cuÃĄndo una canciÃģn con Juan Luis? Yo lo recibÃ­a como un ÂŋquiÃĐn sabe?, ÂŋcuÃĄndo podrÃĄ ser? o lo recibÃ­a como: ÂĄalgÃšn dÃ­a tendrÃĐ una canciÃģn apropiada para hacer con ÃĐl! Pero cuando le montÃĐ la voz a esta canciÃģn me tomÃĐ el atrevimiento de escribirle, le mostrÃĐ el tema y le dije que soÃąaba con poder  hacerla con ÃĐl. Juan Luis no me dejÃģ terminar, literalmente, no me dejÃģ terminar. Me dijo que estaba encantado con la canciÃģn y por supuesto me dijo que sÃ­. De ahÃ­ en adelante todo transcurriÃģ de maravilla, hasta que Juan Luis montÃģ voces, me la enviÃģ e hicimos esta ediciÃģn de los dos. En tiempo de pandemia fue imposible juntarnos. Pero creo que el resultado es mÃĄs que obvio. Es una hermosÃ­sima canciÃģn de amor que espero toque el corazÃģn a todo el mundo.

localized.title: Ricardo Montaner, Juan Luis Guerra 4.40 - Dios AsÃ­ Lo Quiso
localized.description:
Dios AsÃ­ Lo Quiso ððŦ
Ricardo Montaner y Juan Luis Guerra (Video Oficial)
--
Dios asÃ­ lo quiso la hicimos en el estudio, estÃĄbamos reunidos los hermanos David y Jonathan Julca, Camilo Echeverri, Yasmil Marrufo y yo, y empezÃģ a surgir algo que no tenia ni un porquÃĐ, ni la tenÃ­amos muy clara de lo que estÃĄbamos buscando. SabÃ­amos que lo que yo querÃ­a era una canciÃģn de amor de pareja siguiendo los fundamentos de este ÃĄlbum dedicado al amor, del sentimiento profundo que una persona puede tener por su pareja. âDios asÃ­ lo quisoâ es una canciÃģn de amor, que con el correr del tiempo fue tomando esta cadencia como de cumbia que me llevaba si o si al Caribe. Una vez que le montÃĐ la voz todos me decÃ­an: esta canciÃģn a dÃšo  con Juan Luis serÃ­a espectacular.

ÂŋPorquÃĐ Juan Luis? 
Primero porque soy un fan de toda la mÃšsica de Juan Luis. Lo conozco de hace mucho y es un hermano que mi familia y yo queremos mucho. Por otro lado, ÃĐl ha hecho una espectacular carrera y su legado musical va a ser eterno. Siempre, siempre, la gente me ha comentado: Âŋpara cuÃĄndo una canciÃģn con Juan Luis? Yo lo recibÃ­a como un ÂŋquiÃĐn sabe?, ÂŋcuÃĄndo podrÃĄ ser? o lo recibÃ­a como: ÂĄalgÃšn dÃ­a tendrÃĐ una canciÃģn apropiada para hacer con ÃĐl! Pero cuando le montÃĐ la voz a esta canciÃģn me tomÃĐ el atrevimiento de escribirle, le mostrÃĐ el tema y le dije que soÃąaba con poder  hacerla con ÃĐl. Juan Luis no me dejÃģ terminar, literalmente, no me dejÃģ terminar. Me dijo que estaba encantado con la canciÃģn y por supuesto me dijo que sÃ­. De ahÃ­ en adelante todo transcurriÃģ de maravilla, hasta que Juan Luis montÃģ voces, me la enviÃģ e hicimos esta ediciÃģn de los dos. En tiempo de pandemia fue imposible juntarnos. Pero creo que el resultado es mÃĄs que obvio. Es una hermosÃ­sima canciÃģn de amor que espero toque el corazÃģn a todo el mundo.

snippet.title: Lasso invitarÃĄ a Juan GuaidÃģ a su investidura y se sorprendiÃģ por felicitaciones de Correa y Arauz
snippet.description:
En su primera rueda de prensa como presidente electo, el candidato ganador de la elecciÃģn presidencial Guillermo Lasso dijo que le âsorprendiÃģ positivamenteâ el tuit del expresidente Rafael Correa y la llamada de felicitaciÃģn del candidato perdedor AndrÃĐs Arauz. Ante pregunta de reporteros de la prensa extranjera, Lasso hablÃģ de la inserciÃģn laboral de venezolanos en Ecuador y dijo que a su ceremonia de investidura no invitarÃ­a al cuestionado presidente de Venezuela NicolÃĄs Maduro, sino al lÃ­der opositor Juan GuaidÃģ.

AnÃĄlisis del triunfo de Lasso sobre el correÃ­smo

El anÃĄlisis con el politÃģlogo SimÃģn Pachano quien da su explicaciÃģn de por quÃĐ Lasso le ganÃģ al correÃ­smo y dice que el manejo de la pandemia es el reto mÃĄs inmediato del presidente electo.

snippet.title: Twenty One Pilots - Shy Away (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Twenty One Pilots - Shy Away (Official Video)
Twenty One Pilots official video for "Shy Away" from the forthcoming album Scaled And Icy, available May 21st on Fueled By Ramen.

Twenty One Pilots - Livestream Experience
May 21 @ 8PM ET / 5PM PT
Tickets available at http://live.twentyonepilots.com 

Stream / Download "Shy Away" - https://top.lnk.to/SAI
Pre-order / Pre-Save Scaled And Icy - https://top.lnk.to/SAI

Directed by Miles Cable & AJ Favicchio

LYRICS
When I get home,
You better not be there
We're placing bets you won't
Shed your modesty
And the only thing to leave behind
Is your own skin on the floor

Don't you shy away
Manifest a ceiling when you shy away
Searching for that feeling
Just like an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard
Don't you shh...

When you get home
You barely recognize the pictures they
put in a frame
'Cause you shed your modesty
Don't circle the track
Take what you have
and leave your skin on the floor.

Don't you shy away
Manifest a ceiling when you shy away
Searching for that feeling
Just like an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard

When I get home
Boy, you better not be there
You're long gone
Shed your modesty
Don't circle the track
Just break the cycle in half
and leave your skin on the floor.

Don't you shy away
Manifest a ceiling when you shy away
Searching for that feeling
Just like an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard

that's never heard...

an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard

Don't you shy away.

snippet.title: Brawl Stars Animation - The #GoldarmGang Heist
snippet.description:
Download NOW!! âšâš https://supr.cl/playbrawl
Be a BRAWLER! Subscribe! âšâš https://supr.cl/subscribe

#GoldarmGang #Brawlstars #Belle

Fast-paced 3v3 multiplayer and battle royale made for mobile! Play with friends or solo across a variety of game modes in under three minutes.

Unlock and upgrade dozens of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Collect unique skins to stand out and show off. Battle in a variety of mysterious locations within the Brawliverse!

BATTLE IN MULTIPLE GAME MODES
- Gem Grab (3v3): Team up and out-strategize the opposing team. Collect and hold 10 gems to win, but get fragged and lose your gems.
- Showdown (Solo/Duo): A battle royale style fight for survival. Collect power ups for your Brawler. Grab a friend or play solo - be the last Brawler standing in the rowdiest battle royale yet. Winner take all!
- Brawl Ball (3v3): It's a whole new Brawl game! Show off your soccer/football skills and score two goals before the other team. There are no red cards here.
- Bounty (3v3): Take out opponents to earn stars, but donât let them pick you off. The squad with the most stars wins the match!
- Heist (3v3): Protect your teamâs safe and try to crack open your opponentsâ. Navigate the map to sneak, blast and blow your way clear to the enemies treasure.
- Special Events: Limited time special PvE and PvP game modes.
- Championship Challenge: Join Brawl Stars' esports scene with in-game qualifiers!

UNLOCK AND UPGRADE BRAWLERS
Collect and upgrade a variety of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Level them up and collect unique skins.

BRAWL PASS
Complete quests, open Brawl Boxes, earn Gems, pins and an exclusive Brawl Pass skin! Fresh content every season.

BECOME THE STAR PLAYER
Climb the local and regional leaderboards to prove youâre the greatest Brawler of them all!

CONSTANTLY EVOLVING
Look out for new Brawlers, skins, maps, special events and games modes in the future.

PLEASE NOTE! Brawl Stars is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 9 years of age to play or download Brawl Stars.

Features:
- Team up for real-time 3v3 battles against players from across the world
- A fast-paced multiplayer battle royale mode made for mobile
- Unlock and collect new, powerful Brawlers - each with a signature attack and Super ability
- New events and game modes daily
- Battle solo or with friends
- Climb to the top of the leaderboards in global and local rankings 
- Join or start your own Club with fellow players to share tips and battle together
- Customize Brawlers with unlockable skins
- Player-designed maps offer challenging new terrain to master

From the makers of Clash of Clans, Clash Royale and Boom Beach!

Support:
Contact us in-game via Settings, Help and Support â or visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/brawl-stars/

Privacy Policy:
http://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

Parent's Guide:
http://supercell.com/en/parents/

snippet.title: Apex Legends War Games Event Trailer
snippet.description:
Shall we play a game? The new War Games Event features five rotating takeover modes with never-before-seen modifiers, a new rewards track, and new skins.  

Maggie warned the Legends what would happen if they didnât deliver Fuse to her. Now sheâs following through on her threat. Say goodbye to your precious games -- Salvoâs War Games are here instead. Play five rotating limited-time takeovers over two weeks. Shields regenerate in Shield Regen, round time is reduced whenever a Legend dies in Killing Time, automatically retrieve fallen banners in Auto Banners, compete for top loot in Ultra Zones, and get a free respawn in Second Chance. Plus check out the store to get bold new cosmetics. Everybody loves a little Mayhem -- get out there and make Maggie proud. 

Apex LegendsâĒ is a free-to-play battle royale game where legendary characters battle for glory, fame, and fortune on the fringes of the Frontier. Play for free now on PlayStationÂŪ 4, PlayStation 5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch, and PC via Origin and Steam.  

Learn more about Apex Legends Season 8 â Mayhem: http://x.ea.com/67416
 
Check out our YouTube channel: http://x.ea.com/56710.
Follow us on Twitter: https://twitter.com/playapex.
Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/playapex/.

#WarGames #ApexSeason8 #ApexSeason8 #ApexLegends

nl-NL.title: Apex Legends War Games Event-trailer
nl-NL.description:
Zullen we een spelletje spelen? Het nieuwe War Games Event bevat vijf roulerende takeover modes met nog nooit eerder geziene modifiers, een nieuw beloningenpad en nieuwe skins.  

Maggie waarschuwde de Legends voor wat er zou gebeuren als ze Fuse niet bij haar afleverden. Nu komt ze haar belofte na. Zeg maar dag tegen je kostbare games: je krijgt nu te maken met Salvo's War Games. Speel twee weken lang vijf roulerende tijdelijke takeovers. Schilden herstellen in Shield Regen, de rondetijd wordt verkort als een Legend doodgaat in Killing Time, haal automatisch gevallen banieren op in Auto Banners, speel voor de beste loot in Ultra Zones en krijg een gratis respawn in Second Chance. En ga naar de store om vette nieuwe cosmetische items te krijgen. Iedereen houdt wel van een beetje chaos: stort je in de strijd en maak Maggie trots. 

Apex LegendsâĒ is een free-to-play battle royale-spel waarin legendarische personages strijden om glorie, roem en fortuin aan de rand van de Frontier. Speel nu gratis op de PlayStationÂŪ4, PlayStationÂŪ5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch en pc via Origin en Steam.

pt-BR.description:
Vamos jogar um jogo? O novo Evento Jogos BÃĐlicos possui cinco modos de tomada rotativos com modificadores nunca vistos, uma nova trilha de recompensas e novos visuais.

Maggie avisou as Lendas sobre o que aconteceria se nÃĢo entregassem o Fuse a ela. Agora ela seguiu adiante com as ameaÃ§as. Diga adeus aos Jogos tradicionais... os Jogos BÃĐlicos de Salvo chegaram para substituÃ­-los. Jogue cinco modos rotativos por tempo limitado ao longo de duas semanas. Escudos se regeneram em RegeneraÃ§ÃĢo de Escudo. O tempo de rodada ÃĐ reduzido sempre que uma Lenda morre em Matando Tempo. A recuperaÃ§ÃĢo de banner de quem ÃĐ do seu esquadrÃĢo ÃĐ automÃĄtica em Banners AutomÃĄticos. Entre na disputa pelos melhores itens em Ultra-Ãreas. E ganhe um ressurgimento grÃĄtis em Segunda Chance. AlÃĐm disso, confira a loja para obter novos itens cosmÃĐticos incrÃ­veis. Todo mundo gosta um pouco de Caos... Saia por aÃ­ e deixe a Maggie orgulhosa.

Apex LegendsâĒ ÃĐ um jogo gratuito de battle royale em que personagens lendÃĄrios lutam por glÃģria, fama e fortuna nos limites da Fronteira. Jogue de graÃ§a no Switch, PlayStationÂŪ4, PlayStationÂŪ5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S e PC por meio do Origin e do Steam.

en.title: Apex Legends War Games Event Trailer
en.description:
Shall we play a game? The new War Games Event features five rotating takeover modes with never-before-seen modifiers, a new rewards track, and new skins.  

Maggie warned the Legends what would happen if they didnât deliver Fuse to her. Now sheâs following through on her threat. Say goodbye to your precious games -- Salvoâs War Games are here instead. Play five rotating limited-time takeovers over two weeks. Shields regenerate in Shield Regen, round time is reduced whenever a Legend dies in Killing Time, automatically retrieve fallen banners in Auto Banners, compete for top loot in Ultra Zones, and get a free respawn in Second Chance. Plus check out the store to get bold new cosmetics. Everybody loves a little Mayhem -- get out there and make Maggie proud. 

Apex LegendsâĒ is a free-to-play battle royale game where legendary characters battle for glory, fame, and fortune on the fringes of the Frontier. Play for free now on PlayStationÂŪ 4, PlayStation 5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch, and PC via Origin and Steam.

Official Lyrics:
 
Mr. perfect face
Mr. here to stay
Mr. looked me in the eye and told me you would never go away
Everything was right
Mr. Iâve been waiting for you all my life
Mr. every single day until the end I will be by your side
But that was when I got to know
Mr. change of heart
Mr. leaves me all alone
I fall apart
It takes everything in me just to get up each day
But itâs wonderful to see that youâre okay

Hello, Mr. perfectly fine
Howâs your heart after breaking mine?
Mr. always at the right place at the right time, baby
Hello, Mr. casually cruel
Mr. everything revolves around you
Iâve been Miss misery since your goodbye
And youâre Mr. perfectly fine

Mr. never told me why
Mr. never had to see me cry
Mr. insincere apology so he doesnât look like the bad guy
He goes about his day
Forgets he ever even heard my name
Well I thought you might be different than the rest
I guess youâre all the same
Because I hear heâs got his arm âround a brand new girl
Iâve been picking up my heart
Heâs been picking up her
And I never got past what you put me through
But itâs wonderful to see that it never phased you

Repeat chorus

So dignified in your well pressed suit
So strategized
All the eyes on you
Sashay your way to your seat
Itâs the best seat
In the best room

snippet.title: Las Valquirias no son lo que crees que son (y otras confusiones culturales)
snippet.description:
Las Valquirias son eres de la mitologÃ­a nÃģrdica que han hecho un plot twist mÃĄs grande que cuando descubres que Cubone es un Charmander con la calavera de su madre en la cabeza.
En el siglo IX se las concebÃ­a como demonios de la guerra que devoraban cadÃĄveres. Y el origen de la palabra "Valquiria" tiene mucho que ver con "Valhalla"... Pero del s.XII en adelante se las empezÃģ a reinterpretar de maneras cada vez mÃĄs y mÃĄs alejadas de las historias originales hasta convertirlas en las guerreras nÃģrdicas fuertes y apuestas que conocemos ahora.

localized.title: Las Valquirias no son lo que crees que son (y otras confusiones culturales)
localized.description:
Las Valquirias son eres de la mitologÃ­a nÃģrdica que han hecho un plot twist mÃĄs grande que cuando descubres que Cubone es un Charmander con la calavera de su madre en la cabeza.
En el siglo IX se las concebÃ­a como demonios de la guerra que devoraban cadÃĄveres. Y el origen de la palabra "Valquiria" tiene mucho que ver con "Valhalla"... Pero del s.XII en adelante se las empezÃģ a reinterpretar de maneras cada vez mÃĄs y mÃĄs alejadas de las historias originales hasta convertirlas en las guerreras nÃģrdicas fuertes y apuestas que conocemos ahora.
Y este no es el Ãšnico ejemplo de malentendido cultural del que quiero hablar hoy. Stay tuned.

ÂĄATENCIÃN!
